extract: Virizion (Japanese: ビリジオン Virizion) is a dual-type Grass/Fighting Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation V. While it is not known to evolve into or from any Pokémon, the Paradox Pokémon Iron Leaves is said to be either a future relative of Virizion or a version of it from a parallel timeline. Along with Cobalion, Terrakion, and Keldeo, Virizion is a member of the Swords of Justice. In the movie Kyurem VS. The Sword of Justice, they are also associated with Kyurem.
